zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wallop於1351年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾法利時，他的父親Thomas Wallop26歲，母親Margeret Wallington25歲。他於1389年與Alice Bushey在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1438年在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wallop于1351年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾法利时，他的父亲Thomas Wallop26岁，母亲Margeret Wallington25岁。他于1389年与Alice Bushey在英国英格兰哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1438年在英国英格兰哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wallop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Nether and Over Wallop (Hants).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wallop was born in 1351, in Fawley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Wallop, was 26 and his mother, Margeret Wallington, was 25. He married Alice Bushey in 1389, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1438, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88, and was buried in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wallop est né en 1351, à Fawley, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Wallop, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margeret Wallington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Bushey en 1389, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1438, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wallop 1351 in Fawley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wallop 26 und seine Mutter Margeret Wallington 25. Er hat 1389 in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Bushey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1438 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallop è nato il nel 1351 nel Fawley, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Wallop, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margeret Wallington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Bushey nel 1389, nel Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1438, nel Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallopが1351年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアファウリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Wallopは26歳，母Margeret Wallingtonは25歳であった。1389年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップでAlice Busheyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1438年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallop(이)가 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 파w리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wallop(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margeret Wallington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 Alice Bushey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallop nasceu em 1351, em Fawley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Wallop, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margeret Wallington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Bushey em 1389, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1438, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wallop родился в 1351 г. в местности фавли, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Wallop было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margeret Wallington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Bushey в 1389 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1438 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wallop nació en 1351, en Fawley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Wallop, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margeret Wallington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice Bushey en 1389, en Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1438, en Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
